summary:
Dependency closure for carving the Marketplace out of C:/BOZ-Client-RoF2/src/dllmain_rof2.cpp into a standalone ASI.

MARKETPLACE UNITS (the carve-out, self-contained code that moves wholesale):
  - namespace MktOff (2298-2345) and all the Mkt* typedefs (2347-2361).
  - All Mkt* functions/globals/structs: MktRenameCategory, MktMakeNode, MktAddBranch, MktAddGearBranch, MktPopulate, MktReadable/MktExecutable/MktTileLooksValid/MktSafeSetVisible/MktSafeHide/MktSafeRelayout/MktHideAllTiles, MktFindChild, MktSetChildText, MktSetWidgetText, MktHideChild, struct MktItem + g_mktItems[]/g_mktItemCount/g_mktCollecting/g_mktView/g_mktViewN/g_mktPlayerLevel/g_mktSouls/g_mktConquest/g_mktRaid/g_mktFundsValid and all other g_mkt* globals, MktStrip, MktLookupCategory, MktItemIconAnim, MktFillOneTile, MktTickTiles, MktGridIndexOf, TickMarketplace (2972-3121), ParseBozMkt (3160-3185), the MktPaperDoll/preview typedefs + MktRenderCloneBareRebuild/MktRenderClone/MktMaybeHint/MktShowPreview (4756-4964), MyHook_MktWndNotification + InstallMktVTableHook + g_origMktWndNotif/g_mktVtableCopy/MktWndNotifyFn (4966-5066).
  - Marketplace BRANCHES of three shared hooks (these hooks must be FORKED, keeping only the mkt branch in the standalone): MyHook_PwDraw's `TickMarketplace();` call (2047); MyHook_DspChat's [BOZ_MKT_START]/[BOZ_MKT_LEVEL]/[BOZ_MKT_END]/[BOZ_MKT]/[BOZ_FUNDS] branches (3810-3843); the whole MyHook_MktWndNotification (already mkt-only).

CLOSURE RESULT: union of {mkt units} + {copy_constant Off:: entries} + {copy_helper functions} + {forked hook mkt-branches} is closed. The only cross-unit code dependency is ArmorOrn::PreviewApply (called by MktRenderClone*) — disposition fork_hook/write_fresh: the standalone needs a private armor-slot-repaint primitive (the ArmorOrn FUN_00594E50 hook + g_orig) OR must fork that hook too. CopyField is a shared parser used by both ParseBozNode and ParseBozMkt → copy_helper. SendServerCommand is shared (mkt + node-fight + anti-cheat) → copy_helper. g_orig_DspChat/g_dspChatThis (read by MktMaybeHint) come with the forked dsp_chat hook.
forked_hooks: MyHook_PwDraw (per-frame CPlayerWnd::Draw hook, FUN_00718CF0) — shared with melee-mana re-show + Node-Fight TickCycleHeader + anti-cheat AcFlushPendingFromMainThread; standalone keeps ONLY the `TickMarketplace();` call (line 2047) plus its own install (InstallHook_PwDraw, the FnPwDraw_t typedef, g_orig_PwDraw, g_hookPwDraw_installed). Drop TickCycleHeader/AcFlush/melee-mana from the fork.

MyHook_DspChat (CEverQuest::dsp_chat hook, FUN_0051F1A0) — shared tag dispatcher; standalone keeps ONLY the marketplace branches [BOZ_MKT_START]/[BOZ_MKT_LEVEL]/[BOZ_MKT_END]/[BOZ_MKT] (→ParseBozMkt)/[BOZ_FUNDS] (lines 3810-3843), plus its install (InstallHook_DspChat), FnDspChat_t typedef, g_orig_DspChat, g_hookDspChatInstalled, g_dspChatThis (the latter two read by MktMaybeHint). Drop all BOZ_SPELL_UNLOCK/ARMORORN/MAXMANA/SKILL_*/NODE*/CYCLE/SOUL_BANK/SLOT* branches.

MyHook_MktWndNotification / InstallMktVTableHook (per-instance vtable[34] swap on CMarketplaceWnd) — already 100% marketplace; it is a 'forked hook' only in the sense that it is one of the three hook units and must travel intact with g_origMktWndNotif/g_mktVtableCopy/MktWndNotifyFn.

ArmorOrn FUN_00594E50 apply+repaint hook (namespace ArmorOrn, install at ~6151) — NOT a marketplace unit, but MktRenderClone*/preview call ArmorOrn::PreviewApply through ArmorOrn::g_orig. The standalone must FORK this: bring over just PreviewApply + the g_orig trampoline (Off::FnArmorApply install) so the full-suit/robe preview repaint resolves; the worn-item-walk hook body (MyHook, RefreshWornSlot, worn/render slot maps) is NOT needed by marketplace and can be dropped.

dependencies.used_by: MktRenderCloneBareRebuild (4799)
dependencies.note: 0x0048F4B0 RVA. CDisplay::CreatePlayerActor — rebuilds the live actor bare then restores it around the paper-doll clone.

dependencies.used_by: MktRenderCloneBareRebuild (4800)
dependencies.note: 0x00490A10 RVA. FUN_00490a10 anti-ghost reap of the replaced old actor after each CreatePlayerActor rebuild.

dependencies.used_by: MktRenderCloneBareRebuild (4798)
dependencies.note: 0x00DD2660 RVA. CDisplay singleton ptr (this for CreatePlayerActor).

dependencies.used_by: MktShowPreview (4951)
dependencies.note: 0x00DD2630 RVA. Local-player spawn ptr = the preview subject cloned by the paper-doll. NOTE: also referenced by ArmorOrn — copy the constant; ArmorOrn fork shares it.

dependencies.used_by: MktShowPreview (4954)
dependencies.note: 0x00576CA0 RVA. FUN_00576ca0 native paper-doll: clones GblPreviewSubject into the viewport on a fresh actor.

dependencies.used_by: SendServerCommand (4241) — called by TickMarketplace(#mkt) and MyHook_MktWndNotification(#mktbuy/#mktview)
dependencies.note: 0x00E67CCC RVA. CChatManager singleton. Travels with the SendServerCommand copy_helper.

dependencies.used_by: SendServerCommand (4251)
dependencies.note: 0x005369E0 RVA. CChatManager::SendChatMessage — wire path for the #mkt* commands. Travels with SendServerCommand.

dependencies.used_by: InstallHook_PwDraw (2059) — needed only because the per-frame hook is forked to carry TickMarketplace
dependencies.note: 0x00718CF0 RVA. CPlayerWnd::Draw vtable[3]; the standalone's forked PwDraw hook installs here.

dependencies.used_by: InstallHook_DspChat (3911); g_orig_DspChat is the original called from MktMaybeHint
dependencies.note: 0x0051F1A0 RVA. CEverQuest::dsp_chat. Forked dsp_chat hook installs here AND MktMaybeHint prints the robe hint via the saved g_orig_DspChat trampoline.

dependencies.used_by: ArmorOrn::Install / ArmorOrn::PreviewApply via g_orig (6147), which MktRenderClone* calls
dependencies.note: 0x00594E50 RVA. The per-slot armor apply+repaint primitive. Needed so the forked ArmorOrn::PreviewApply primitive resolves for the full-suit/robe preview repaint.

dependencies.used_by: every Mkt* function
dependencies.note: Self-contained set of marketplace offsets/struct-field constants (pWnd, CreateCats/RenderCats, NodeAlloc/NodeCtor/CXStrCtor, MakeTile/TplResolve/FindChild, SetIcon/AnimFind/AnimCtor/AnimCopy, UiMgr=0x015D3D08, Grid/SelNode/TreeCtrl + field offsets, LeafVtable/BranchVtable, VtSetText/VtSetVis/VtLayout, TileTplId, NameColor). Part of the marketplace unit — moves wholesale, no external split. (UiMgr duplicates Off::SidlMgrPtr 0x015D3D08 so the mkt code never needs Off:: for the UI mgr.)

dependencies.used_by: every Mkt* fn, SendServerCommand, the forked hooks (RVA->runtime rebase)
dependencies.note: The RVA->runtime address helper (g_baseAddr + off). Trivial; copy verbatim. ResolveBase()/g_baseAddr must be initialized in the standalone's DllMain/init before any Resolve call.

dependencies.used_by: SendServerCommand, InstallMktVTableHook, the forked hook installers + dsp_chat mkt branch logging
dependencies.note: Tiny fopen/vfprintf logger. Copy verbatim (maybe repoint PATH to a standalone log).

dependencies.used_by: SendServerCommand (4242), the forked hook installers (prologue checks)
dependencies.note: VirtualQuery commit/protect/extent guard. Copy verbatim. (Note the mkt tile code uses its OWN MktReadable/MktExecutable, already inside the marketplace unit — IsReadable is only needed by SendServerCommand + the forked installers.)

dependencies.used_by: TickMarketplace (3012 #mkt), MyHook_MktWndNotification (4986 #mktbuy / 4999 #mktview)
dependencies.note: Shared with Node-Fight + anti-cheat in the monolith. For the standalone, copy this one function + its typedef; it pulls in copy_constants ChatMgrPtr + FnChatSend, and helpers Resolve/IsReadable/Log. Self-contained once those travel.

dependencies.used_by: ParseBozMkt (3165+), and the [BOZ_FUNDS] branch of the forked dsp_chat hook (3835-3837)
dependencies.note: Pipe-delimited field copier. Shared with ParseBozNode in the monolith; copy verbatim into the standalone.

dependencies.used_by: MktRenderCloneBareRebuild (4808,4838) and MktRenderClone via the bare-rebuild paths
dependencies.note: Marketplace's ONLY cross-unit CODE call. Fork the ArmorOrn hook: bring PreviewApply + the g_orig FUN_00594E50 trampoline (Install + FnArmorApply_t typedef + g_installed/g_orig globals). The standalone does NOT need ArmorOrn's worn-item-walk MyHook body, RefreshWornSlot, or the worn/render slot maps. Alternatively write_fresh a private 9-arg apply wrapper that resolves FnArmorApply and calls it directly (no hook needed since PreviewApply uses g_orig=the un-hooked entry anyway).

dependencies.used_by: MktMaybeHint (4929,4933) prints the one-time robe preview hint
dependencies.note: Owned by the dsp_chat hook unit; they travel with the forked dsp_chat hook. MktMaybeHint reads g_orig_DspChat (the saved trampoline) + g_dspChatThis to paint the [Marketplace] hint line. No separate copy needed if the dsp_chat hook is forked.

dependencies.used_by: MktRenderCloneBareRebuild (4799 reinterpret_cast)
dependencies.note: Pure typedef for CreatePlayerActor's __thiscall signature. The monolith defines it once for the gravestone CreateActor hook; the standalone needs just the typedef (copy it; do NOT pull in MyHook_CreateActor / g_orig_CreateActor — unrelated).

dependencies.used_by: the forked per-frame hook that carries TickMarketplace
dependencies.note: Part of forking MyHook_PwDraw. Copy the typedef/globals/installer; strip the non-mkt calls (TickCycleHeader, AcFlushPendingFromMainThread, melee-mana re-show) from the forked MyHook_PwDraw body so the standalone keeps only TickMarketplace().

dependencies.used_by: the forked dsp_chat hook carrying the [BOZ_MKT*]/[BOZ_FUNDS] branches
dependencies.note: Part of forking MyHook_DspChat. Copy typedef/globals/installer; the forked MyHook_DspChat body keeps ONLY the marketplace string branches + a tail call to g_orig_DspChat.

dependencies.symbol: windows.h / psapi.h APIs (VirtualAlloc, VirtualProtect, VirtualFree, VirtualQuery, MEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION, FlushInstructionCache, GetCurrentProcess, GetModuleHandleA, GetLastError, HeapAlloc/HeapFree/GetProcessHeap, GetTickCount, CreateThread, GetProcAddress)
dependencies.used_by: InstallMktVTableHook (HeapAlloc/HeapFree/GetProcessHeap), the forked hook installers (VirtualAlloc/Protect/Flush), memory guards (VirtualQuery)
dependencies.note: Standard Win32. Just #include <windows.h>; no copy.

dependencies.used_by: MktFillOneTile, MktTickTiles, TickMarketplace, MktRenderClone*, MktShowPreview, InstallMktVTableHook, SetListRowColor pattern
dependencies.note: MSVC structured exception handling. Compiler-provided; POD-only locals already enforced in those scopes.

dependencies.symbol: CRT string/mem fns (lstrcmpA, lstrcpynA, _snprintf, strncmp, strchr, strtoul, atoi, strcpy, strlen, memcpy, memset)
dependencies.used_by: ParseBozMkt, MktLookupCategory, MktAddGearBranch, MktTickTiles, MktFillOneTile, TickMarketplace, MyHook_MktWndNotification, the [BOZ_FUNDS] dsp_chat branch
dependencies.note: lstrcmpA/lstrcpynA are kernel32; the rest are CRT (<cstring>/<cstdlib>/<cstdio>). #include the headers; no copy.

dependencies.used_by: all mkt code
dependencies.note: Win32 typedefs + stdint. Headers only.
